creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
The configure script for databases/portsgresql doesn't know
	about FreeBSD 4.0, so the port breaks on the configure target.

Fix: The following diff creates for the port a new patch, which
	teaches postgresql's configure script about FreeBSD 4.0:
How-To-Repeat: 
	On any machine where ``uname -r'' report 4.0-CURRENT, do
	``cd /usr/ports/databases/postgresql ; make configure''
